name: WolframAlpha
description: Send a natural-language computational query to the Wolfram|Alpha LLM API and receive a concise text result optimized for language-model consumption.

auth.hint: Create a Wolfram|Alpha AppID and send it as Authorization: Bearer <APPID>. Store the AppID in Arthur MCP Secrets.

tools.name: answer_query
tools.description: Return Wolfram|Alpha computational knowledge formatted for use by a language model.

params.name: input
params.description: Single-line natural-language or keyword computational query.

params.name: maxchars
params.description: Maximum response character count; the documented default is 6800.

params.name: units
params.description: Preferred unit system, such as metric or imperial.
